source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, if $\angle A = 31^\circ$, then what is the value of $\angle A + \angle B + \angle C + \angle D + \angle E$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} According to the given conditions,\\
\[ \because \angle AFG+\angle AGF=180^\circ-\angle A, \angle CFG+\angle AFG=180^\circ, \angle EGF+\angle AGF=180^\circ\]
\[ \therefore \angle CFG+\angle EGF=360^\circ-\left(\angle AFG+\angle AGF\right)=360^\circ-\left(180^\circ-\angle A\right)=180^\circ+\angle A\]
Also \[ \because \angle CFG=\angle B+\angle C, \angle EGF=\angle D+\angle E,\]
\[ \therefore \angle A+\angle B+\angle C+\angle D+\angle E\]
\[ =\angle A+\angle CFG+\angle EGF\]
\[ =180^\circ+2\angle A\]
\[ =180^\circ+2\times 31^\circ\]
\[ =\boxed{242^\circ}\]

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says "As shown in the figure"
the needed angles B, C, D, E are defined through the diagram rather than fully specified in text
multi_step: solution combines multiple angle relations before substituting angle A=31 degrees
reasoning links diagram-based composite angles (e.g. CFG=B+C and EGF=D+E) to the target sum
task is not direct lookup; it requires at least several geometric deduction steps
verifiability: final answer is a single numeric angle value (242 degrees)
provided answer shows an explicit derivation that can be checked step by step against the figure
registry_passed=true and both question and answer are present in the asset record

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产均存在，核心语义未缺失，样本具备进入候选池的基本条件
该题对图像依赖很高（题干明确依赖示意图），而图像尺寸仅为162x174，存在可读性与还原风险
存在 metadata.image_field is null 的登记问题，虽不构成核心语义缺失，但需要后续人工或流程复核
按高召回原则，此类有缺口但仍可恢复的样本应优先保留为 low_priority，而非过早 reject

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: As shown in the figure, if $\angle A = 31^\circ$, then what is the value of $\angle A + \angle B + \angle C + \angle D + \angle E$?
normalization_record.normalized_answer_text:
According to the given conditions,
\[ \because \angle AFG+\angle AGF=180^\circ-\angle A, \angle CFG+\angle AFG=180^\circ, \angle EGF+\angle AGF=180^\circ \]
\[ \therefore \angle CFG+\angle EGF=360^\circ-\left(\angle AFG+\angle AGF\right)=360^\circ-\left(180^\circ-\angle A\right)=180^\circ+\angle A \]
Also,
\[ \because \angle CFG=\angle B+\angle C, \angle EGF=\angle D+\angle E \]
\[ \therefore \angle A+\angle B+\angle C+\angle D+\angle E \]
\[ =\angle A+\angle CFG+\angle EGF \]
\[ =180^\circ+2\angle A \]
\[ =180^\circ+2\times 31^\circ \]
\[ =\boxed{242^\circ} \]
